overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a medieval fantasy campfire scene at night, featuring two characters resting by an ornate stone hearth in a covered courtyard. Warm firelight flickers against historic stone architecture and heavy blue drapes while the static camera observes the tranquil atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: A tranquil nighttime scene in a covered stone courtyard centered around a flickering fire pit. Two characters sit on opposite sides of the flames, resting in the warm glow while heavy blue drapes frame the background. The static camera captures the medieval architecture and ambient firelight without movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric observation of a tranquil medieval courtyard bathed in the flickering glow of a nighttime fire. It begins with a focused view of two characters resting on opposite sides of an ornate stone fire pit, their forms illuminated by the dancing flames. As the warm light pulses, it casts shifting shadows across the surrounding historic stone architecture and the heavy blue drapes framing the background. The scene remains poised in this stillness, allowing the ambient firelight to define the quiet, sheltered space before the shot concludes.
